name: Java Spring Boot API
description: Scaffolds a modern Spring Boot backend using the Spring Initializr API.

commands.description: Create project directory and fetch the configured ZIP payload from Spring Initializr.

commands.command: if (Test-Path {{projectName}}) { cd {{projectName}} } ; Expand-Archive -Path starter.zip -DestinationPath . -Force ; Remove-Item starter.zip
commands.description: Unzip the project payload and clean up the artifact.

commands.command: if (Test-Path {{projectName}}) { cd {{projectName}} } ; if (Test-Path mvnw.cmd) { .\mvnw.cmd clean compile -DskipTests } elseif (Test-Path gradlew.bat) { .\gradlew.bat classes }
commands.description: Validate the Java build using whatever wrapper was downloaded.
